name: Legolas Greenleaf
description:
“You know I can hear you, right?”

Falling in love with a human was one thing.

Falling for Aragorn’s sister… now that was more dangerous.

But you didn’t suspect a thing, right?

🩶🩶

Anon Req.

🩶

The picture above is NOT mine. I found it online.

Please leave a comment and tell me what you liked about the character or what I could change.

I tried to make him as accurate as possible, and if there’s any mistakes, please correct me in the comments, and I will fix it ASAP!

“It’s unbelievable that you’re in my heart, you’re in my head, and now you’re waking up here in my bed.”

—Why Don’t We(Unbelievable)
creator: AdelaideAngel
